init.title: Gicisky Options
init.description: Adjust how images are written to the device.

data_description.retry_count: Number of times to retry writing to the device before giving up.
data_description.write_delay_ms: Delay between each chunk written to the device. Increase if writes are unreliable.
data_description.prevent_duplicate_send: Skip writing when the new image is identical to the last one sent.
data_description.debounce_ms: Delay before writing to device. New writes cancel pending ones. 0 = disabled (immediate write).
